title: Learning With Errors: The Foundation of Modern Lattice Cryptography
description: Master the Learning With Errors (LWE) problem, the cornerstone of post-quantum cryptographic constructions. Understand its mathematical formulation, security proofs, and why it enables secure encryption.
learningObjectives: Define the LWE problem precisely in both search and decision variants
Understand the role of error distributions in LWE security
Explain the worst-case to average-case reduction
Analyze parameter selection for concrete security
Connect LWE to the hardness of lattice problems
